title: Russian Natto Pilaf
description: A spicy Mexican twist on traditional Russian pilaf, incorporating intense, velvety natto for added richness.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the cumin and chili powder, and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the pilaf and cook for 2-3 minutes, until lightly toasted.
Add the Russian natto and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until heated through.
Serve hot, garnished with additional lime wedges if desired.
Cook time can be adjusted depending on the type of pilaf being used.
For a more intense flavor, add diced jalapenos or serrano peppers to the pilaf.
For a creamier texture, add a splash of heavy cream or sour cream to the pilaf.
